name: Appwrite API
description: Connect Cline to Appwrite API through this MCP server configuration from the imported plugin marketplace bundle.

env.name: APPWRITE_ENDPOINT
env.description: Appwrite API value for appwrite endpoint.

env.name: APPWRITE_PROJECT_ID
env.description: Appwrite API value for appwrite project id.

env.name: APPWRITE_API_KEY
env.description: Appwrite API value for appwrite api key.
